content.query:
/* =========================================================
   1. Create schema
   ========================================================= */
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'bronze1')
BEGIN
    EXEC ('CREATE SCHEMA bronze1');
END;
GO

/* =========================================================
   2. Drop old objects
   ========================================================= */
IF OBJECT_ID('bronze1.staging_Patient_CDC', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE bronze1.staging_Patient_CDC;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('bronze1.Patient', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE bronze1.Patient;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('bronze1.usp_apply_patient_cdc', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE bronze1.usp_apply_patient_cdc;
GO

/* =========================================================
   3. Create CDC staging table
   This table receives rows from Azure SQL CDC query
   ========================================================= */
CREATE TABLE bronze1.staging_Patient_CDC
(
    __$start_lsn   VARBINARY(10)  NULL,
    __$seqval      VARBINARY(10)  NULL,
    __$operation   INT            NULL,
    __$update_mask VARBINARY(128) NULL,

    PatientID      INT            NOT NULL,
    FirstName      VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    LastName       VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    DateOfBirth    DATE           NOT NULL,
    Gender         VARCHAR(10)    NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

/* =========================================================
   4. Create target Bronze table
   ========================================================= */
CREATE TABLE bronze1.Patient
(
    PatientID      INT            NOT NULL,
    FirstName      VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    LastName       VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    DateOfBirth    DATE           NOT NULL,
    Gender         VARCHAR(10)    NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

/* =========================================================
   5. Create procedure to apply CDC changes
   __$operation:
   1 = delete
   2 = insert
   4 = update (new values)
   We ignore 3 = update old values
   ========================================================= */
CREATE PROCEDURE bronze1.usp_apply_patient_cdc
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    /* -----------------------------------------
       Step 1. Delete rows from target
       ----------------------------------------- */
    DELETE tgt
    FROM bronze1.Patient AS tgt
    INNER JOIN bronze1.staging_Patient_CDC AS src
        ON tgt.PatientID = src.PatientID
    WHERE src.__$operation = 1;

    /* -----------------------------------------
       Step 2. Take latest INSERT / UPDATE row
       per PatientID from staging
       ----------------------------------------- */
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#LatestChanges') IS NOT NULL
        DROP TABLE #LatestChanges;

    CREATE TABLE #LatestChanges
    WITH
    (
        DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
        HEAP
    )
    AS
    SELECT
        PatientID,
        FirstName,
        LastName,
        DateOfBirth,
        Gender,
        __$operation,
        __$start_lsn,
        __$seqval
    FROM
    (
        SELECT
            src.PatientID,
            src.FirstName,
            src.LastName,
            src.DateOfBirth,
            src.Gender,
            src.__$operation,
            src.__$start_lsn,
            src.__$seqval,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER
            (
                PARTITION BY src.PatientID
                ORDER BY src.__$start_lsn DESC, src.__$seqval DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM bronze1.staging_Patient_CDC AS src
        WHERE src.__$operation IN (2, 4)
    ) d
    WHERE d.rn = 1;

    /* -----------------------------------------
       Step 3. Update existing rows
       ----------------------------------------- */
    UPDATE tgt
    SET
        tgt.FirstName   = src.FirstName,
        tgt.LastName    = src.LastName,
        tgt.DateOfBirth = src.DateOfBirth,
        tgt.Gender      = src.Gender
    FROM bronze1.Patient AS tgt
    INNER JOIN #LatestChanges AS src
        ON tgt.PatientID = src.PatientID;

    /* -----------------------------------------
       Step 4. Insert new rows
       ----------------------------------------- */
    INSERT INTO bronze1.Patient
    (
        PatientID,
        FirstName,
        LastName,
        DateOfBirth,
        Gender
    )
    SELECT
        src.PatientID,
        src.FirstName,
        src.LastName,
        src.DateOfBirth,
        src.Gender
    FROM #LatestChanges AS src
    LEFT JOIN bronze1.Patient AS tgt
        ON tgt.PatientID = src.PatientID
    WHERE tgt.PatientID IS NULL;

    /* -----------------------------------------
       Step 5. Clear staging
       ----------------------------------------- */
    TRUNCATE TABLE bronze1.staging_Patient_CDC;
END;
GO

--testing
SELECT * 
FROM bronze1.Patient
ORDER BY PatientID;

SELECT *
FROM bronze1.staging_Patient_CDC
ORDER BY PatientID;

EXEC bronze1.usp_apply_patient_cdc;
